title: Moving into Eagle Hills La Gare: What Premium Residential Tenants Need to Coordinate with Property Management
excerpt: Eagle Hills La Gare move-in: premium tenant property management coordination, freight elevator, deposits, COI, residential relocation luxury tower Addis.
content:
Moving into Eagle Hills La Gare: what premium residential tenants need to coordinate with property management

La Gare premium tenants face property management precision—move permits, insurance certificates, damage deposits, and freight rules enforced uniformly not negotiable at gate argument. Coordination before truck books prevents turn-away humiliation and fine invoices post-move.

This guide coordinates residential moves with Eagle Hills La Gare property management.

Management coordination checklist

  • Move application form and fee payment receipt.
  • COI naming building minimum coverage limits.
  • Refundable damage deposit amount and payment method.
  • Freight elevator reservation start-end with overtime rate acknowledged.
  • Crew roster IDs photos 48h prior.
  • Truck plate confirmation 24h prior.
  • Floor protection specification—approved vendor materials list.
  • Quiet hours and Sunday policy confirm written.

Tenant responsibilities day-of

Escort or appointed rep present entire window; sign elevator log hourly; report incident immediately; debris removed corridor end state—no overnight cartons hallway.

Luxury inventory disclosure

Piano art hoist—management engineering approval separate form; balcony lift insurance rider sometimes required.

Post-move inspection

Joint walk lobby elevator unit touchpoints; photo timestamp; deposit return timeline understand policy.

Active Movers La Gare residential tier

Management template package; protection materials spec match; liaison phone client authorizes.

Conclusion

La Gare premium move succeeds when property management checklist complete before dispatch—tenants coordinate paper power crew and protection equal furniture quality.
author: Active Movers Team
